info.name: whiff Dating App Stories
info.description: Create real dating app story cards for the whiff blog story wall.

body.raw:
{
  "story": "I kept matching with people and still felt like I was getting further away from actually meeting someone. Every conversation made me wonder if I should keep looking, and that made me less present with the person in front of me.",
  "creditMode": "anonymous",
  "label": "Choice overload",
  "quote": "I had options, but I did not feel any closer to connection.",
  "takeaway": "Too many choices made it harder to be present."
}

item.name: Create nickname story - ghosting with gift email

body.raw:
{
  "story": "The ghosting was bad, but what bothered me more was how normal it started to feel. I caught myself expecting people to disappear, even when the conversation was good. After a while I was not excited anymore. I was bracing myself.",
  "creditMode": "nickname",
  "nickname": "Still Trying",
  "email": "stilltrying@example.com",
  "label": "Ghosting",
  "quote": "The silence started feeling like part of the app.",
  "takeaway": "The pattern changed how open I was with new people."
}

item.name: Create anonymous story - first date pressure

body.raw:
{
  "story": "A normal coffee date started feeling heavier than it should. I was not just listening to them. I was trying to decide if this could become my whole future. That made it hard to enjoy a simple conversation.",
  "creditMode": "anonymous",
  "label": "First date pressure",
  "quote": "Coffee started feeling like a decision about my whole future.",
  "takeaway": "A first meeting should not have to carry that much weight."
}
